name: get_associated_targets_by_disease_efoId
description:
Find targets associated with a specific disease or phenotype based on efoId.

Args:
    efoId: The EFO ID of a disease or phenotype.

    Query example: {
    "efoId": "EFO_0000400"
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing search results with targets associated with the specified disease or phenotype.
label: Disease
Phenotype
Target
Association
OpenTarget
GraphQL

efoId.description: The efoId of a disease or phenotype.

name: get_associated_diseases_phenotypes_by_target_ensemblID
description:
Find diseases or phenotypes associated with a specific target using ensemblId.

Args:
    ensemblId: The Ensembl ID of a target.

    Query example: {
    "ensemblId": "ENSG00000198888"
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing search results with diseases or phenotypes associated with the specified target.
    The results include the disease ID, name, and a list of datasource scores indicating the strength of the association from various sources.
label: Target
Disease
Phenotype
Association
OpenTarget
GraphQL

name: target_disease_evidence
description:
Explore evidence that supports a specific target-disease association.

Args:
    efoId: The EFO ID of a disease or phenotype.
    ensemblId: The Ensembl ID of a target.

    Query example: {
    "efoId": "EFO_0000400",
    "ensemblId": "ENSG00000198888"
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing evidence supporting the association between the specified target and disease,
    including disease and target details, and potentially source information.
label: Target
Disease
Evidence
Association
OpenTarget
GraphQL

efoId.description: The efoId of a disease or phenotype.

name: get_drug_warnings_by_chemblId
description:
Retrieve warnings for a specific drug using ChEMBL ID.

Args:
    chemblId: The ChEMBL ID of the drug.

    Query example: {
    "chemblId": "CHEMBL2"
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing drug warnings for the specified ChEMBL ID.
    Note: The example output provided does not show any warnings,
    only the drug ID and name. A more complete example would be
    needed to fully describe the warnings structure.

name: get_similar_entities_by_disease_efoId
description:
Retrieve similar entities for a given disease efoId using a model trained with PubMed.

Args:
    efoId: The EFO ID of the disease.
    threshold: Threshold similarity between 0 and 1. Only results above threshold are returned.
    size: Number of similar entities to fetch.

    Query example: {
    "efoId": "EFO_0000400",
    "threshold": 0.5,
    "size": 10
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing similar entities to the specified disease, based on the provided threshold and size.

efoId.description: The EFO ID of the disease.

threshold.description: Threshold similarity between 0 and 1. Only results above threshold are returned.

size.description: Number of similar entities to fetch.

label: Disease
Similarity
Model
Entities
OpenTarget
GraphQL

name: multi_entity_search_by_query_string
description:
Perform a multi-entity search based on a query string, filtering by entity names and pagination settings.
Args:
    queryString: The search string for querying information.
    entityNames: List of entity names to search for (e.g., target, disease, drug).
    page: Pagination settings with index and size.
Query example: {
    "queryString": "inflammatory bowel disease",
    "entityNames": ["disease"],
    "page": {
        "index": 0,
        "size": 5
    }
}
Returns:
    Dictionary containing search results with total hits and a list of entities matching the query.

queryString.description: The search string for querying information.

entityNames.description: List of entity names to search for (e.g., target, disease, drug).

page.description: Pagination settings with index and size.

label: Search and Mapping Functions
MultiEntitySearch
Pagination
OpenTarget
GraphQL

name: get_publications_by_disease_efoId
description:
Retrieve publications related to a disease EFO ID, including PubMed IDs and publication dates.

Args:
    entityId: The EFO ID of the disease.
    additionalIds: Optional list of additional IDs to include in the search.
    startYear: Optional year at the lower end of the filter.
    startMonth: Optional month at the lower end of the filter.
    endYear: Optional year at the higher end of the filter.
    endMonth: Optional month at the higher end of the filter.

    Query example: {
    "entityId": "EFO_0003767",
    "startYear": 2020
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing publications related to the specified disease,
    including total count, filtered count, earliest publication year,
    and a list of rows, each with PubMed ID, PMC ID, publication date,
    and matched sentences containing entity mentions.

additionalIds.description: List of additional IDs to include in the search.

startYear.description: Year at the lower end of the filter.

startMonth.description: Month at the lower end of the filter.

endYear.description: Year at the higher end of the filter.

endMonth.description: Month at the higher end of the filter.

label: Publications
Data Retrieval and Aggregation
GraphQL
OpenTarget

name: get_publications_by_target_ensemblID
description:
Retrieve publications related to a target Ensembl ID, including PubMed IDs and publication dates.

Args:
    entityId: The Ensembl ID of the target.
    additionalIds: Optional list of additional IDs to include in the search.
    startYear: Optional year at the lower end of the filter.
    startMonth: Optional month at the lower end of the filter.
    endYear: Optional year at the higher end of the filter.
    endMonth: Optional month at the higher end of the filter.

    Query example: {
    "entityId": "ENSG00000146648",
    "endYear": 2023
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing publications related to the specified target,
    including total count, filtered count, earliest publication year,
    and a list of rows, each with PubMed ID, PMC ID, publication date,
    and matched sentences containing entity mentions.

label: Publications
Data Retrieval and Aggregation
GraphQL
OpenTarget

name: get_publications_by_drug_chemblId
description:
Retrieve publications related to a drug ChEMBL ID, including PubMed IDs and publication dates.

Args:
    entityId: The ChEMBL ID of the drug.
    additionalIds: Optional list of additional IDs to include in the search.
    startYear: Optional year at the lower end of the filter.
    startMonth: Optional month at the lower end of the filter.
    endYear: Optional year at the higher end of the filter.
    endMonth: Optional month at the higher end of the filter.

    Query example: {
    "entityId": "CHEMBL135",
    "startYear": 2020,
    "endMonth": 6
}

Returns:
    Dictionary containing publications related to the specified drug,
    including total count, filtered count, earliest publication year,
    and a list of rows, each with PubMed ID, PMC ID (if available), publication date,
    and matched sentences containing entity mentions.
